blocks.body: Past Simple: pytania i krótkie odpowiedzi — Did you...?, Did he...?, Yes, I did. / No, she didn't.

{"level":"A1–A2","intro":"W pytaniach Past Simple stawiamy did przed podmiotem i używamy głównego czasownika w V1.","rules":[{"label":"Did + subject + V1?","color":"emerald","text":"Ten sam model z did działa dla każdego podmiotu.","example":"Did you call me? / Did she go home?"},{"label":"No V2 after did","color":"blue","text":"Po did nie używaj formy przeszłej.","example":"Did he work? / Did they see it?"},{"label":"Short answers","color":"amber","text":"W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj did albo didn't.","example":"Yes, I did. / No, she didn't."}]}

{"title":"1. Podstawowe modele pytań","intro":"W pytaniu najpierw stawiamy did.","items":[{"label":"I / you / we / they","title":"Did ... + V1?","subtitle":"Did you call? / Did they stay here?"},{"label":"he / she / it","title":"Did ... + V1?","subtitle":"Did he work yesterday? / Did she see Tom?"},{"label":"Yes","title":"Yes, ... did.","subtitle":"Yes, I did. / Yes, she did."},{"label":"No","title":"No, ... didn't.","subtitle":"No, we didn't. / No, he didn't."}]}

{"title":"2. Po co są te pytania","sections":[{"label":"O przeszłych czynnościach","color":"emerald","description":"Pytaj o to, co wydarzyło się wczoraj, w zeszłym tygodniu albo wcześniej.","examples":[{"en":"Did you watch the film yesterday?","ua":"Pytanie o zakończoną czynność w przeszłości."},{"en":"Did they arrive on time?","ua":"Pytanie o zakończone wydarzenie."}]},{"label":"O szczegóły wydarzenia","color":"blue","description":"Zadawaj pytania o zakończone wydarzenie, wizytę albo podróż.","examples":[{"en":"Did she visit Krakow last year?","ua":"Pytanie o wizytę w przeszłości."},{"en":"Did he buy the tickets?","ua":"Pytanie o zakończoną czynność."}]},{"label":"Krótkie odpowiedzi","color":"amber","description":"Nie powtarzaj całego zdania. Wystarczy krótki model z did / didn't.","examples":[{"en":"Did you finish the task? — Yes, I did.","ua":"Krótka odpowiedź twierdząca."},{"en":"Did she call you? — No, she didn't.","ua":"Krótka odpowiedź przecząca."}]}]}

{"title":"3. Pytanie i krótka odpowiedź","intro":"W odpowiedzi powtarzaj did albo didn't, a nie całe zdanie.","rows":[{"en":"Did you call Anna?","ua":"Yes, I did. / No, I didn't.","note":"did → did / didn't"},{"en":"Did she go by bus?","ua":"Yes, she did. / No, she didn't.","note":"go po did"},{"en":"Did they see the message?","ua":"Yes, they did. / No, they didn't.","note":"ten sam model dla wszystkich podmiotów"}],"warning":"Nie mów Did he went? ani Yes, she do."}

{"title":"4. Typowe błędy","items":[{"label":"Błąd 1","color":"rose","title":"Używanie V2 po did.","wrong":"❌ Did he went home?","right":"✅ Did he go home?"},{"label":"Błąd 2","color":"amber","title":"Brak did na początku pytania.","wrong":"❌ You saw her yesterday?","right":"✅ Did you see her yesterday?"},{"label":"Błąd 3","color":"sky","title":"Zła forma w krótkiej odpowiedzi.","wrong":"❌ Yes, she do.","right":"✅ Yes, she did."}]}

{"title":"5. Krótkie podsumowanie","items":["Pytanie w Past Simple = Did + subject + V1.","Model jest taki sam dla każdego podmiotu.","Po did główny czasownik zawsze zostaje w V1.","W krótkich odpowiedziach powtarzaj did / didn't."]}
